ourStudio.mainText: We are a full service architecture and design practice defined by rigor, narrative, and collaboration. Designing from the inside out, we carry each idea from vision to detail - shaping spaces that feel intentional, coherent, and built to last.
ourStudio.secondaryText: "Our studio philosophy: We believe true architecture is felt. What endures is not only the design, but the experience it creates."

content.mainText: Based in Houston and working globally, we've spent over two decades uniting architecture and interior design collaborating with private clients, developers, and cultural institutions at every scale.

biography.mainText: Together, Erick and Rachel have a combined five decades of experience yielding numerous award-winning and highly successful projects. Personal and nuanced attention to detail is a hallmark of our design sensibility.
